steps.title: Relate the shown graph to f
steps.content: The graph shown is $y=f(x)+4$. To recover $f(x)$, subtract $4$ from every $y$-value on the shown graph.

steps.title: Test the matching function
steps.content: The function in choice B gives $$f(x)=-6^x+5$$ so the shown graph would be $$y=f(x)+4=-6^x+9$$ This matches the displayed vertical shift and shape. The answer is B.
